title: Mirai Kuriyama 32x
description: A 32x Minecraft PVP resourcepack based on the Anime Kyoukai no Kanata (Beyond the Boundary)
body:
# ⚔️ Mirai Kuriyama [32x] ⚔️
An Anime Style PVP Resourcepack

## Features
  Small Shield
  
  Detailed 512x Items
  
  Custom Sky
  
  Custom Inventory
  
  Shorter Tools
  
  Distinguishable Netherite and Stone Tools
  
  Rose/Pink Theme

  Aesthetic Pastel Colors
  
  ...And much more!

[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Loteq1/videos)

## Showcase (more images in the Gallery tab)
![Items, Ores,  Armor, End Crystal Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a91e5685bf8cc8abb65d58f3f3e0428a6f22a441.png)
